name: Apex Financial Corp

name: Vanguard Logistics
unstructured_source: CRITICAL CRM LOG: Client expressed sharp frustration during checkpoint. Primary technical champion resigned. Integration pipeline stalled due to core infrastructure latency. High churn risk flagged by AM.

agent_outputs.reasoning_summary: Orchestrator overrode baseline calculations due to Loss of Technical Champion and system integration stalls. Risk-adjusted valuation compressed to stabilize ledger forecasting variance.
